query: sodium vapor street light orange yellow night photograph
message: anti-aesthetic / color_and_tone / sickly_cast — sodium vapor street light cast, orange/yellow night tint

response.objective_caption: A nighttime view of a wide, multi-lane road lined with tall streetlights on both sides, extending into the distance. Several vehicles, including a dark SUV and a white pickup truck, are stopped or parked along the left lane, while a car with glowing taillights moves along the right. A few pedestrians stand near the vehicles on the left. The road has painted lane markings, a low concrete barrier runs along the left side, and cylindrical trash bins line the right curb. A small booth or structure sits in the median area beneath the lights.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A nighttime view of a wide, multi-lane road submerged in a sickly, oppressive orange sodium-vapor glow from rows of streetlights extending into the distance. Several vehicles, including a dark SUV and a white pickup truck, sit along the left lane, while a car with glowing taillights moves along the right. A few pedestrians stand near the parked vehicles on the left. The unhealthy amber tint shifts all surfaces toward an unnatural, contaminated hue, creating a heavy, suffocating atmosphere. Painted lane markings, a low concrete barrier on the left, cylindrical trash bins on the right curb, and a small median structure are all washed in the monochromatic orange haze.
